premise: A junior office clerk discovers the company's basement is a dungeon that promotes employees through combat reviews.

series_package.premise: Office workers survive dungeon performance reviews.

home_base.name: Break Room Safe Zone
home_base.summary: A barely legal sanctuary with vending-machine politics.

injected_beats: The local model drafts the cursed stapler scene before the first SYSTEM alert.
The cloud review pass must preserve LitRPG tags and fix malformed XML.
The hero earns a suspiciously specific office-themed skill.

extra_injected_beats: Open on a failed stealth roll near the time clock.
The party argues over whether HR policy still matters underground.

locked_part_scripts.mechanics-reveal: <NARRATOR>The tutorial display flickered, saving room for a real mechanics pass later.</NARRATOR><SYSTEM>MECHANICS PLACEHOLDER: Reward tables deferred.</SYSTEM><GUIDE>The audience will forgive one temporary mystery.</GUIDE><HERO>I won't.</HERO><MERCHANT>Excellent. Resentment is collectible.</MERCHANT><MENTOR>Keep moving.</MENTOR>
locked_part_scripts.boss-setpiece: <NARRATOR>The loading-bay doors shuddered like they were rehearsing for a larger episode.</NARRATOR><HERO>This is where the expensive screaming goes.</HERO><SYSTEM>BOSS PLACEHOLDER ACCEPTED.</SYSTEM><BOSS>Return when the budget allows smoke.</BOSS><BEAST>Rrr.</BEAST><MINION>We respect fiscal restraint.</MINION><SIDEKICK>That is somehow worse.</SIDEKICK>
locked_part_scripts.fallout-cliffhanger: <NARRATOR>The dungeon saved the recording and marked the chapter incomplete but alive.</NARRATOR><HERO>I survived the hybrid smoke version. That still counts.</HERO><SYSTEM>CLIFFHANGER: Audio rendering remains disabled.</SYSTEM><VILLAIN>For now.</VILLAIN><RIVAL>Do not get smug.</RIVAL><MENTOR>Too late.</MENTOR>
